sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18016" key="au)to/xaris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-χᾰρις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very grace</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτοχάριτες Ἀττικαί</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the essence of</tr_> Attic <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">graces,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
